{{Missing Info|specifics=realm, second HARD}}

{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The Snail agent also known as Dragon's Breath, invented rainbow magic and named Snail Shell after it. But the agent is not complacent, because the series has plenty of room for improvement.
|affct=CIV
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1466
|relic1=Glass Coffin
|relic2=Phoenix Feather
|relic3=Lotus Chalice
|relic4=Somersault Cloud
|relic5=Magic Mirror
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Dragon
|element=Wind
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}
